description: Triggers when user needs a strategic SEO plan, roadmap, or content strategy for a website
should_trigger: Create an SEO strategy for my SaaS startup
I need an SEO roadmap for my new website
Build an SEO plan for my ecommerce store
What's a good content strategy for SEO?
I want to do competitive SEO analysis for my business
Help me plan SEO for a local service business
Create a 12-month SEO roadmap with milestones
should_not_trigger: Fix the meta description on my homepage
Add a sitemap.xml to my Next.js app
How do I write alt text for images?
Setup Google Analytics on my site
